description_long: This is a compact, floor-standing electric radiator with a rectangular body and slightly angled side panels. The front features a wide horizontal grille for air output, with the brand name 'ELEKTROTERM' printed in red at the lower right. The back panel is darker and includes a power cord neatly coiled and attached, as well as two mounting brackets or feet for stability. The sides are slim, with visible control knobs and a power socket on one side, indicating user-adjustable settings. The radiator stands on two sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on efficient heat distribution and easy placement in urban indoor environments.
description: A compact, floor-standing electric radiator with a horizontal grille, control knobs, and a coiled power cord on the back. The body is rectangular with sturdy legs and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide horizontal grille, brand logo, and the main heat output area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, control knobs, and power socket.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the darker back panel, coiled power cord, and mounting brackets or feet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the control panel and the cord extending from the back.
attribute_pipe_connections: none visible; electric power cord at rear right
